creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
I took a look and more work is needed.

- Could some of the option names / descriptions be more concise.  They are cut off in theoptions dialog.
- DOCSDIR and EXAMPLESDIR require DOCS and EXAMPLE options.
- Please see 'Order of Variables in Port Makefiles' chapter of the Porter's Hadbook

I began to tinker with the port, but there is more work to be done.  Maybe you could use this as a guide to continue.

https://github.com/Jehops/freebsd-ports/tree/freediameter/net/freediameter
